topic: clonal selection and influence on wine style
trigger_keywords: selección clonal permite elegir plantas con características específicas
influir en el estilo del vino

steps.label: cause
steps.text: A grower propagates a selected vine clone that has shown particular inherited characteristics.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Vegetative propagation preserves the selected clone's genetic traits, which may influence yield, bunch or berry size, ripening timing, disease susceptibility, and grape composition.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: Choosing among suitable clones can help orient grape composition and therefore wine style, although site, season, viticulture, and winemaking remain important.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: Clonal selection can influence wine style by propagating vines with chosen inherited traits; it does not determine the final style by itself.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
